name: PB2 - AbuseIPDB Threat Intelligence Enrichment
description: Playbook 2: Extracts source IP from T-Pot webhook alert and queries AbuseIPDB via SOAR proxy to retrieve abuse confidence score, country of origin, and ISP information.

triggers.name: T-Pot Alert Webhook
triggers.description: Receives alerts from T-Pot Logstash HTTP output
triggers.note: Can share same webhook as PB1 or use separate trigger

actions.name: Extract Source IP
actions.description: Extract src_ip field from incoming webhook payload

actions.name: Query AbuseIPDB
actions.description: Query AbuseIPDB reputation via SOAR proxy /check endpoint. Proxy calls AbuseIPDB API and returns score, country, ISP.

parameters.note: Returns JSON with abuseConfidenceScore, countryCode, isp, totalReports

notes.bottleneck: Docker container spawn + external AbuseIPDB API call
notes.key_finding: 7 of 21 checked IPs (33%) had 100% abuse confidence score
notes.setup: AbuseIPDB API key is configured in SOAR proxy, not in this playbook
